pageContext.name: White Snake - Xiaoqing-Verta
pageContext.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present this amazing collectible, the White Snake - Xiaoqing-Verta Sixth Scale Collectible based on one of the standout characters from the 2019 animated Chinese film White Snake and its sequel Green Snake. This character is a fan favorite based on her personality, design, and role within the series of movies.  This sixth scale figure stands approximately 11.41 inches tall and comes with a variety of accessories based on her appearance in the movie. Order today to add to your collection!
